prompt: Warp the letter shapes along these vectors to give a sense of high-speed airflow.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the BMW M logo. Distort the white 'M' letterform by warping it along the direction of the blue, dark blue, and red stripes to its left. The warping should visually convey a dynamic sense of high-speed airflow, similar to the streamlines and arrows depicted in image 2.
